    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="es">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>POZO/MGR</title>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
    <style>
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');
    :root{--bg:#0f1117;--bg2:#171b26;--bg3:#1e2332;--border:#2a2f42;--border2:#353b52;--text:#e8eaf0;--text2:#8b91a8;--text3:#555d78;--accent:#4f8ef7;--accent2:#2563d4;--green:#34c77b;--red:#f05454;--amber:#f5a623;--mono:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;--sans:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif}
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--sans);min-height:100vh}
    .header{background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;height:52px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50}
    .logo{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.08em}
    .logo span{color:var(--text3)}
    .htabs{display:flex;gap:2px;margin-left:auto}
    .htab{padding:6px 13px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;margin-bottom:-1px;font-family:var(--sans)}
    .htab:hover{color:var(--text)}.htab.active{color:var(--text);border-bottom-color:var(--accent)}
    .user-info{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-left:12px;padding-left:12px;border-left:1px solid var(--border)}
    .main{padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto}
    .panel{display:none}.panel.active{display:block}
    .card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:.9rem 1.1rem;margin-bottom:10px}
    .card-title{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;margin-bottom:12px}
    .g2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
    .g3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
    .g4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px}
    .stat{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px;text-align:center}
    .stat-val{font-size:26px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--mono)}
    .stat-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em}
    label{display:block;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;font-family:var(--mono);margin-bottom:4px}
    input,select,textarea{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--sans);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s}
    input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{border-color:var(--accent)}
    select option{background:var(--bg3)}
    textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:60px}
    .btn{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--sans);transition:background .15s}
    .btn:hover{background:var(--accent2)}.btn:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:default}
    .btn-sm{padding:5px 11px;font-size:12px}
    .btn-green{background:rgba(52,199,123,.15);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(52,199,123,.3)}
    .btn-green:hover{background:rgba(52,199,123,.25)}
    .btn-red{background:rgba(240,84,84,.1);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(240,84,84,.25)}
    .btn-red:hover{background:rgba(240,84,84,.2)}
    .btn-ghost{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text2);border:1px solid var(--border)}
    .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}
    .badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;font-family:var(--mono)}
    .b-green{background:rgba(52,199,123,.12);color:var(--green);border:1px solid rgba(52,199,123,.25)}
    .b-red{background:rgba(240,84,84,.12);color:var(--red);border:1px solid rgba(240,84,84,.25)}
    .b-amber{background:rgba(245,166,35,.12);color:var(--amber);border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,.25)}
    .b-blue{background:rgba(79,142,247,.12);color:var(--accent);border:1px solid rgba(79,142,247,.25)}
    .b-gray{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text3);border:1px solid var(--border)}
    .b-empty{background:rgba(240,84,84,.05);color:var(--text3);border:1px dashed rgba(240,84,84,.3)}
    .row-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:all .1s}
    .row-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}
    .row-item:hover{padding-left:6px;background:rgba(79,142,247,.04);border-radius:4px;margin:0 -6px;padding-right:6px}
    .ri-main{flex:1}.ri-id{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;font-family:var(--mono)}
    .ri-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px}
    .filters{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:12px}
    .ff{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px}
    .ff input,.ff select{min-width:120px}
    .bar-row{margin-bottom:9px}
    .bar-label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:3px}
    .bar-track{height:5px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:3px}
    .bar-fill{height:5px;border-radius:3px}
    .chart-wrap{position:relative;width:100%;height:300px;margin-top:12px}
    .pagination{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)}
    .pg-btn{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);border-radius:5px;padding:5px 11px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--sans)}
    .pg-btn:disabled{opacity:.35;cursor:default}
    .pg-btn:not(:disabled):hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}
    .modal-bg{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);z-index:200;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding:2rem 1rem;overflow-y:auto;backdrop-filter:blur(3px)}
    .modal-bg.open{display:flex}
    .modal{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:12px;padding:1.4rem;width:min(680px,95vw);margin:auto}
    .modal-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px}
    .modal-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--mono)}
    .modal-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px}
    .modal-close:hover{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--text)}
    .dg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px;margin-bottom:10px}
    .di{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:9px 11px}
    .di-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-family:var(--mono)}
    .di-val{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;margin-top:3px}
    .obs-box{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,.3);border-radius:6px;padding:9px 11px;font-size:12px;color:var(--amber);margin-top:8px}
    .timeline{position:relative;padding-left:22px;margin-top:6px}
    .timeline::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:6px;top:6px;bottom:6px;width:2px;background:var(--border2);border-radius:1px}
    .tl-item{position:relative;margin-bottom:10px}
    .tl-item:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
    .tl-dot{position:absolute;left:-18px;top:5px;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border2);background:var(--bg3)}
    .tl-dot.active{background:var(--green);border-color:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(52,199,123,.5)}
    .tl-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:8px 11px}
    .tl-card.active{border-color:rgba(52,199,123,.3);background:rgba(52,199,123,.04)}
    .tl-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;font-family:var(--mono);margin-bottom:2px}
    .tl-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)}
    .tl-actions{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px}
    .estimation-box{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid rgba(79,142,247,.25);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-top:10px}
    .est-title{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:8px}
    .est-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:6px}
    .est-item{background:var(--bg2);border-radius:5px;padding:7px 9px}
    .est-lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono)}
    .est-val{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--mono);margin-top:2px}
    .range-ok{color:var(--green)}.range-warn{color:var(--amber)}.range-err{color:var(--red)}
    .sub-tabs{display:flex;gap:3px;margin-bottom:12px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:3px;width:fit-content}
    .stab{padding:5px 13px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text2);border-radius:5px;font-family:var(--sans)}
    .stab.active{background:var(--bg2);color:var(--text);border:1px solid var(--border2)}
    .toast{position:fixed;bottom:1.5rem;right:1.5rem;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 16px;font-size:13px;z-index:999;transform:translateY(80px);opacity:0;transition:all .3s;max-width:320px}
    .toast.show{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}
    .toast.ok{border-left:3px solid var(--green)}.toast.err{border-left:3px solid var(--red)}
    .section-divider{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text3);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;padding:8px 0 6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:10px}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg)}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border2);border-radius:3px}
    @media(max-width:700px){.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.g3,.g2{grid-template-columns:1fr}.main{padding:.8rem}}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <header class="header">
    <div class="logo">POZO<span>/</span>MGR</div>
    <nav class="htabs">
    <button class="htab active" onclick="showPanel('dashboard')">Dashboard</button>
    <button class="htab" onclick="showPanel('inventario')">Inventario</button>
    <button class="htab" onclick="showPanel('catalogo')">Catálogo</button>
    <button class="htab" onclick="showPanel('buscar')">Equivalente</button>
    <button class="htab" onclick="showPanel('analitica')">Analítica</button>
    <button class="htab" onclick="showPanel('datos')">Datos</button>
    </nav>
    <div class="user-info">
    <span>{{ username }}</span>
    <span class="badge b-gray" style="font-size:10px">{{ role }}</span>
    <a href="/logout" style="color:var(--text3);font-size:11px;text-decoration:none">salir</a>
    </div>
    </header>
    <main class="main">
    <!-- DASHBOARD -->
    <div class="panel active" id="panel-dashboard">
    <div style="margin-bottom:14px"><h1 style="font-size:19px;font-weight:600">Dashboard</h1></div>
    <div class="g4" style="margin-bottom:12px" id="dash-stats"></div>
    <div class="g2">
    <div class="card"><div class="card-title">Bombas por estado</div><div id="dash-estados"></div></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="card-title">Montadas por zona</div><div id="dash-zonas"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="g2" style="margin-top:10px">
    <div class="card"><div class="card-title">Montadas por HP</div><div id="dash-hp"></div></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="card-title">Modelos más instalados</div><div id="dash-modelos"></div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- INVENTARIO -->
    <div class="panel" id="panel-inventario">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px">
    <div><h1 style="font-size:19px;font-weight:600">Inventario</h1><p id="inv-sub" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)"></p></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="exportarExcel()">↓ Excel</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost btn-new-perf" onclick="abrirNuevaPerf()">+ Perforación</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-new-perf" onclick="abrirNuevaBomba()">+ Bomba</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sub-tabs">
    <button class="stab active" onclick="showSubInv('perforaciones')">Perforaciones</button>
    <button class="stab" onclick="showSubInv('bombas')">Bombas</button>
    </div>
    <!-- Sub: perforaciones -->
    <div id="sub-perforaciones">
    <div class="filters">
    <div class="ff" style="flex:1;min-width:180px"><label>Buscar</label>
    <input type="text" id="fPTexto" placeholder="Calle, modelo, TAG, zona..." oninput="filtrarPerfs()">
    </div>
    <div class="ff"><label>Estado</label>
    <select id="fPEstado" onchange="filtrarPerfs()">
    <option value="">Todos</option>
    <option value="Montado">Montado</option>
    <option value="Desmontado">Desmontado / Libre</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div class="ff"><label>Zona</label><select id="fPZona" onchange="filtrarPerfs()"><option value="">Todas</option></select></div>
    <div class="ff"><label>HP</label><select id="fPHP" onchange="filtrarPerfs()"><option value="">Todos</option></select></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="padding:.5rem 1.1rem"><div id="perfs-lista"></div></div>
    <div class="pagination">
    <button class="pg-btn" id="btnPP" onclick="perfPag(-1)">← Ant.</button>
    <span id="pagInfoP" style="font-family:var(--mono)"></span>
    <button class="pg-btn" id="btnNP" onclick="perfPag(1)">Sig. →</button>
    <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)" id="perfCount"></span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- Sub: bombas -->
    <div id="sub-bombas" style="display:none">
    <div class="filters">
    <div class="ff" style="flex:1;min-width:180px"><label>Buscar</label>
    <input type="text" id="fBTexto" placeholder="N° equipo, TAG, modelo, marca..." oninput="filtrarBombas()">
    </div>
    <div class="ff"><label>Estado</label>
    <select id="fBEstado" onchange="filtrarBombas()">
    <option value="">Todas</option>
    <option value="Montado">Montada</option>
    <option value="disponible">Disponible</option>
    <option value="Desmontado">Desmontada</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div class="ff"><label>Marca</label><select id="fBMarca" onchange="filtrarBombas()"><option value="">Todas</option></select></div>
    <div class="ff"><label>HP</label><select id="fBHP" onchange="filtrarBombas()"><option value="">Todos</option></select></div>
    <div class="ff"><label>Ubicación</label>
    <select id="fBUbic" onchange="filtrarBombas()">
    <option value="">Todas</option>
    <option>Montada</option>
    <option>Pañol</option>
    <option>Sucursal</option>
    <option>Grúa</option>
    <option>PSM Cañero</option>
    <option>En reparación</option>
    <option>Baja</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="padding:.5rem 1.1rem"><div id="bombas-lista"></div></div>
    <div class="pagination">
    <button class="pg-btn" id="btnPB" onclick="bombaPag(-1)">← Ant.</button>
    <span id="pagInfoB" style="font-family:var(--mono)"></span>
    <button class="pg-btn" id="btnNB" onclick="bombaPag(1)">Sig. →</button>
    <span style="margin-left:auto;font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)" id="bombaCount"></span>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- CATÁLOGO, BUSCAR, ANALÍTICA, DATOS panels (simplified placeholders filled by JS) -->
    <div class="panel" id="panel-catalogo">
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px"><h1 style="font-size:19px;font-weight:600">Catálogo Motorarg</h1><p id="cat-sub" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)"></p></div>
    <div class="filters">
    <div class="ff" style="flex:1"><label>Buscar</label><input type="text" id="cTexto" oninput="filtrarCat()" placeholder="Modelo..."></div>
    <div class="ff"><label>HP</label><select id="cHP" onchange="filtrarCat()"><option value="">Todos</option></select></div>
    <div class="ff"><label>Descarga</label><select id="cDesc" onchange="filtrarCat()"><option value="">Todas</option></select></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="padding:.5rem 1.1rem"><div id="cat-lista"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" id="panel-buscar">
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px"><h1 style="font-size:19px;font-weight:600">Buscar equivalente</h1></div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Bomba a reemplazar</div>
    <div class="g3" style="margin-bottom:10px">
    <div><label>Perforación montada</label><select id="bDirSel" onchange="autoFillDir()"><option value="">— elegir —</option></select></div>
    <div><label>Q trabajo (m³/h)</label><input type="number" id="bQ" step=".5" min="0" placeholder="ej: 20"></div>
    <div><label>H trabajo (m)</label><input type="number" id="bH" step="1" min="0" placeholder="ej: 80"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="g3">
    <div><label>HP máx.</label><input type="number" id="bHP2" step=".5" min="0" placeholder="sin límite"></div>
    <div><label>Descarga</label><select id="bDesc2"><option value="">—</option><option>2"</option><option>2 1/2"</option><option>3"</option><option>4"</option><option>3" - 4"</option></select></div>
    <div><label>Tolerancia ±%</label><input type="number" id="bTol" value="20" step="5" min="5" max="50"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="bInfoActual" style="display:none;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px 14px;margin-top:10px;font-size:12px"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" style="margin-top:12px" onclick="buscarEq()">🔍 Buscar</button>
    </div>
    <div id="buscar-resultados"></div>
    <div class="chart-wrap" id="chartBuscarWrap" style="display:none"><canvas id="chartBuscar"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" id="panel-analitica">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px">
    <h1 style="font-size:19px;font-weight:600">Analítica</h1>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="exportarExcel()">↓ Exportar Excel</button>
    </div>
    <div class="sub-tabs" id="anal-tabs">
    <button class="stab active" onclick="showSubAnal('rango')">⚠ Fuera de rango</button>
    <button class="stab" onclick="showSubAnal('faltantes')">⚡ Datos faltantes</button>
    <button class="stab" onclick="showSubAnal('antiguedad')">🕐 Antigüedad</button>
    <button class="stab" onclick="showSubAnal('estadisticas')">📊 Estadísticas</button>
    </div>
    <div id="subanal-rango"></div>
    <div id="subanal-faltantes" style="display:none"></div>
    <div id="subanal-antiguedad" style="display:none"></div>
    <div id="subanal-estadisticas" style="display:none"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel" id="panel-datos">
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px"><h1 style="font-size:19px;font-weight:600">Datos</h1></div>
    <div class="sub-tabs" id="datos-tabs">
    <button class="stab active" onclick="showSubDatos('catalogo')">Importar catálogo</button>
    <button class="stab" id="tabUsers" style="display:none" onclick="showSubDatos('usuarios')">Usuarios</button>
    </div>
    <div id="subdatos-catalogo">
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Importar catálogo de bombas (curvas H-Q)</div>
    <div style="border:2px dashed var(--border2);border-radius:10px;padding:2rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg3);position:relative" id="dropCat"
    ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--accent)'"
    ondragleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--border2)'"
    ondrop="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--border2)';processFileCat(event.dataTransfer.files[0])">
    <input type="file" accept=".xlsx,.xls" style="position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;cursor:pointer" onchange="processFileCat(this.files[0])">
    <div style="font-size:28px;margin-bottom:8px">📂</div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:500">Arrastrá el Excel aquí</div>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">Caudales_de_bombas.xlsx · Hoja Bombas Motorarg</div>
    </div>
    <div id="statusCat" style="margin-top:8px"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px"><div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:0">Log</div><button onclick="document.getElementById('logBox').innerHTML=''" style="background:none;border:none;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer">Limpiar</button></div>
    <div id="logBox" style="background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:10px 12px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);max-height:160px;overflow-y:auto"><span style="color:var(--text3)">— Esperando —</span></div></div>
    </div>
    <div id="subdatos-usuarios" style="display:none">
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Usuarios</div>
    <div id="users-lista"></div>
    <div style="margin-top:14px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
    <div class="card-title">Nuevo usuario</div>
    <div class="g3">
    <div><label>Usuario</label><input type="text" id="nu-user"></div>
    <div><label>Contraseña</label><input type="password" id="nu-pass"></div>
    <div><label>Rol</label><select id="nu-role"><option value="viewer">viewer</option><option value="editor">editor</option><option value="admin">admin</option></select></div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" style="margin-top:8px" onclick="crearUsuario()">Crear</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">Mi contraseña</div>
    <div class="g3">
    <div><label>Actual</label><input type="password" id="pw-current"></div>
    <div><label>Nueva</label><input type="password" id="pw-new"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-end"><button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="cambiarPassword()">Cambiar</button></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </main>
    <!-- MODAL PERFORACIÓN -->
    <div class="modal-bg" id="modal-perf" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal('perf')">
    <div class="modal" style="width:min(760px,95vw)">
    <div class="modal-header">
    <div class="modal-title" id="modal-perf-title"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="btn-edit-perf" onclick="editarPerfActual()" style="display:none">✏ Editar pozo</button>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('perf')">✕</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="modal-perf-body"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- MODAL BOMBA -->
    <div class="modal-bg" id="modal-bomba" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal('bomba')">
    <div class="modal" style="width:min(760px,95vw)">
    <div class="modal-header">
    <div class="modal-title" id="modal-bomba-title"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="btn-edit-bomba" onclick="editarBombaActual()" style="display:none">✏ Editar bomba</button>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('bomba')">✕</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="modal-bomba-body"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- MODAL FORM GENÉRICO -->
    <div class="modal-bg" id="modal-form" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal('form')">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
    <div class="modal-title" id="modal-form-title"></div>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('form')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div id="modal-form-body"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- MODAL ASIGNAR BOMBA -->
    <div class="modal-bg" id="modal-asignar" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal('asignar')">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
    <div class="modal-title" id="modal-asignar-title">Asignar bomba</div>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('asignar')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div id="modal-asignar-body"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- MODAL CATÁLOGO DETALLE -->
    <div class="modal-bg" id="modal-cat" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal('cat')">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
    <div class="modal-title" id="modal-cat-title"></div>
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('cat')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div id="modal-cat-body"></div>
    <div class="chart-wrap" style="height:220px;margin-top:12px"><canvas id="modal-chart"></canvas></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="toast" id="toast"></div>
    <script>
    // ══ STATE ══
    const USER_ROLE = '{{ role }}';
    const USER_ID = {{ user_id }};
    const CAN_EDIT = ['editor','admin'].includes(USER_ROLE);
    const CAN_ADMIN = USER_ROLE === 'admin';
    let PERFS = [], BOMBAS = [], CATALOGO = [];
    let perfsFiltered = [], bombasFiltered = [];
    let perfPage = 0, bombaPage = 0;
    const PER = 20;
    let chartBuscar = null, chartModal = null, chartComp = null;
    const COLORS = ['#4f8ef7','#34c77b','#f5a623','#f05454','#9b59b6','#1abc9c'];
    let currentPerfId = null, currentBombaId = null;
    // ══ UTILS ══
    const fmt = f => (!f||f==='NaT'||f==='null') ? '—' : f;
    const fmtLoc = r => [r.calle, r.entre&&r.entre!=='0'?`e/${r.entre}`:null, r.y_col&&r.y_col!=='0'?`y ${r.y_col}`:null].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
    const normZona = z => {if(!z)return'Sin zona';const l=z.toLowerCase();if(l.includes('sur'))return'La Plata Sur';if(l.includes('norte'))return'La Plata Norte';return z;}
    function ubicBadge(u){
    if(!u)return'<span class="badge b-gray">Sin ubicación</span>';
    if(u==='Montada')return estadoBadge('Montado');
    if(u==='Baja')return'<span class="badge b-red">Baja</span>';
    if(u==='En reparación')return'<span class="badge b-amber">En reparación</span>';
    return`<span class="badge b-blue">${u}</span>`;
    }
    function estadoBadge(e){
    if(!e||e==='Desmontado')return'<span class="badge b-red">Desmontado</span>';
    if(e==='Montado')return'<span class="badge b-green">Montado</span>';
    return`<span class="badge b-amber">${e}</span>`;
    }
    function librebadge(){return'<span class="badge b-empty">Sin bomba</span>';}
    function toast(msg,type='ok'){
    const t=document.getElementById('toast');
    t.textContent=msg;t.className='toast '+type+' show';
    setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),3000);
    }
    function openModal(id){document.getElementById('modal-'+id).classList.add('open');}
    function closeModal(id){document.getElementById('modal-'+id).classList.remove('open');}
    async function api(url,method='GET',body=null){
    const opts={method,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}};
    if(body)opts.body=JSON.stringify(body);
    const res=await fetch(url,opts);
    if(res.status===401){window.location.href='/login';return null;}
    return res;
    }
    function barChart(elId,dataObj,colorMap,sortByKey=false){
    const entries=Object.entries(dataObj).sort((a,b)=>sortByKey?parseFloat(a[0])-parseFloat(b[0]):b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,8);
    const max=Math.max(...entries.map(e=>e[1]),1);
    document.getElementById(elId).innerHTML=entries.map(([k,n])=>`
    <div class="bar-row"><div class="bar-label"><span>${k}</span><span style="font-family:var(--mono)">${n}</span></div>
    <div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:${Math.round(n/max*100)}%;background:${typeof colorMap==='string'?colorMap:colorMap[k]||'var(--text3)'}"></div></div></div>`).join('');
    }
    function interpH(curva,q){
    // Given Q → returns H (for buscar equivalente)
    if(!curva||!curva.length)return null;
    if(q<=curva[0][0])return curva[0][1];
    for(let i=1;i<curva.length;i++){
    if(q<=curva[i][0]){const t=(q-curva[i-1][0])/(curva[i][0]-curva[i-1][0]);return curva[i-1][1]+t*(curva[i][1]-curva[i-1][1]);}
    }
    return 0;
    }
    function interpQ(curva,h){
    // Given H → returns Q (for caudal estimation from depth)
    // curva is [[Q,H],...] where H decreases as Q increases
    if(!curva||!curva.length)return null;
    const hMax=curva[0][1], hMin=curva[curva.length-1][1];
    if(h>hMax||h<hMin)return null;
    for(let i=0;i<curva.length-1;i++){
    const h1=curva[i][1], h2=curva[i+1][1];
    const q1=curva[i][0], q2=curva[i+1][0];
    if(h<=h1&&h>=h2){
    const t=(h1-h)/(h1-h2);
    return q1+t*(q2-q1);
    }
    }
    return null;
    }
    function normFecha(s){
    // Store as yyyy-mm-dd internally for correct DB sorting
    if(!s||s==='—')return null;
    s=s.trim();
    if(!s)return null;
    // dd/mm/yyyy or dd-mm-yyyy → yyyy-mm-dd
    const sep=s.includes('/')?'/':'-';
    const p=s.split(sep);
    if(p.length===3&&p[2].length===4){
    return p[2]+'-'+p[1].padStart(2,'0')+'-'+p[0].padStart(2,'0');
    }
    // already yyyy-mm-dd
    if(p.length===3&&p[0].length===4)return s;
    return s;
    }
    function fmtFechaDisplay(s){
    // Display yyyy-mm-dd as dd-mm-yyyy
    if(!s||s==='—')return'—';
    const p=s.split('-');
    if(p.length===3&&p[0].length===4)return p[2]+'-'+p[1]+'-'+p[0];
    return s;
    }
    function normModelo(m){
    if(!m)return'';
    let s=m.toLowerCase().replace(/^bms\s*/,'').replace(/["\s]/g,'').trim();
    const hpMatch=s.match(/\/(\d+[,.]?\d*)(?:[-\w"]*)/);
    const hp=hpMatch?parseFloat(hpMatch[1].replace(',','.')):null;
    const seriesRaw=s.split('/')[0];
    const series=seriesRaw.replace(/rn|rl|r2|xn|xf|xp|xj|x3|x2/g,'').replace(/[a-z]+$/,'');
    return hp!==null?`${series}/${hp}`:series;
    }
    function findCat(modelo){
    if(!modelo||!CATALOGO.length)return null;
    let f=CATALOGO.find(b=>b.modelo===modelo);
    if(f)return f;
    const nr=normModelo(modelo);
    if(!nr)return null;
    const parts=nr.split('/');
    const serR=parts[0], hpR=parts[1]?parseFloat(parts[1]):null;
    f=CATALOGO.find(b=>{
    if(!b.modelo)return false;
    const nb=normModelo(b.modelo);
    if(nb===nr)return true;
    const partsB=nb.split('/');
    const serB=partsB[0], hpB=partsB[1]?parseFloat(partsB[1]):null;
    return serB&&serR&&serB===serR&&hpB!==null&&hpR!==null&&Math.abs(hpB-hpR)<0.1;
    });
    return f||null;
    }
    function showPanel(p){
    document.querySelectorAll('.htab').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelector(`.htab[onclick*="${p}"]`).classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('panel-'+p).classList.add('active');
    if(p==='analitica')showSubAnal('rango');
    }
    // ══ LOAD ══
    async function loadAll(){
    const [pr,br,cr]=await Promise.all([api('/api/perforaciones'),api('/api/bombas'),api('/api/catalogo')]);
    if(pr&&pr.ok)PERFS=await pr.json();
    if(br&&br.ok)BOMBAS=await br.json();
    if(cr&&cr.ok)CATALOGO=await cr.json();
    renderDash();
    initInvFilters();
    filtrarPerfs();
    filtrarBombas();
    initCatFilters();
    initBuscarSelect();
    }
    // ══ DASHBOARD ══
    async function renderDash(){
    const res=await api('/api/stats');
    if(!res||!res.ok)return;
    const s=await res.json();
    document.getElementById('dash-stats').innerHTML=`
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--green)">${s.montadas}</div><div class="stat-lbl">Montadas</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-val" style="color:var(--accent)">${s.disponibles}</div><div class="stat-lbl">Disponibles</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-val">${s.total_bombas}</div><div class="stat-lbl">Bombas</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-val">${s.total_perforaciones}</div><div class="stat-lbl">Perforaciones</div></div>`;
    const estados={'Montado':s.montadas,'Disponible':s.disponibles};
    barChart('dash-estados',estados,{'Montado':'var(--green)','Disponible':'var(--accent)'});
    barChart('dash-zonas',Object.fromEntries(s.por_zona.map(z=>[z.zona||'Sin zona',z.n])),'var(--accent)');
    barChart('dash-hp',Object.fromEntries(s.por_hp.map(h=>[h.hp+' HP',h.n])),'var(--amber)',true);
    const mMax=s.modelos_top[0]?.n||1;
    document.getElementById('dash-modelos').innerHTML=s.modelos_top.map((m,i)=>`
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
    <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);min-width:14px;font-family:var(--mono)">${i+1}</span>
    <span style="flex:1;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--mono)">${m.modelo}</span>
    <div style="width:60px;height:4px;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:2px"><div style="height:4px;width:${Math.round(m.n/mMax*100)}%;background:var(--green);border-radius:2px"></div></div>
    <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono)">${m.n}</span>
    </div>`).join('');
    }
    // ══ INVENTARIO — PERFORACIONES ══
    function showSubInv(s){
    document.querySelectorAll('.sub-tabs .stab').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelector(`.sub-tabs .stab[onclick*="${s}"]`).classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('sub-perforaciones').style.display=s==='perforaciones'?'block':'none';
    document.getElementById('sub-bombas').style.display=s==='bombas'?'block':'none';
    }
    function initInvFilters(){
    const zonas=[...new Set(PERFS.map(p=>normZona(p.zona)))].sort();
    const hps=[...new Set(BOMBAS.map(b=>b.hp).filter(Boolean))].sort((a,b)=>a-b);
    const marcas=[...new Set(BOMBAS.map(b=>b.marca).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    populate('fPZona',zonas);
    populate('fPHP',hps,h=>h+' HP');
    populate('fBMarca',marcas);
    populate('fBHP',hps,h=>h+' HP');
    document.getElementById('inv-sub').textContent=`${PERFS.length} perforaciones · ${BOMBAS.length} bombas · ${BOMBAS.filter(b=>b.estado_actual==='Montado').length} montadas`;
    }
    function populate(id,items,label=null){
    const s=document.getElementById(id);
    while(s.options.length>1)s.remove(1);
    items.forEach(v=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=v;o.textContent=label?label(v):v;s.appendChild(o);});
    }
    function filtrarPerfs(){
    const txt=(document.getElementById('fPTexto').value||'').toLowerCase().trim();
    const est=document.getElementById('fPEstado').value;
    const zon=document.getElementById('fPZona').value;
    const hp=document.getElementById('fPHP').value;
    perfsFiltered=PERFS.filter(p=>{
    if(txt){
    const c=String(p.calle||''),e=String(p.entre||''),y=String(p.y_col||'');
    const dirs=[`${c} y ${y}`,`${c} ${y}`,`${c} e/${e} y ${y}`].map(s=>s.toLowerCase());
    const campos=[p.modelo||'',p.marca||'',p.tag||'',p.n_equipo||'',p.zona||'',p.calle||'',p.y_col||''].map(s=>s.toLowerCase());
    if(![...dirs,...campos].some(x=>x.includes(txt)))return false;
    }
    if(est){
    const isMontado=p.estado_actual==='Montado';
    if(est==='Montado'&&!isMontado)return false;
    if(est==='Desmontado'&&isMontado)return false;
    }
    if(zon&&normZona(p.zona)!==zon)return false;
    if(hp&&String(p.hp)!==hp)return false;
    return true;
    });
    perfPage=0;renderPerfs();
    }
    function renderPerfs(){
    const start=perfPage*PER, end=Math.min(start+PER,perfsFiltered.length);
    document.getElementById('perfCount').textContent=`${perfsFiltered.length} resultado(s)`;
    document.getElementById('pagInfoP').textContent=`${perfPage+1}/${Math.max(1,Math.ceil(perfsFiltered.length/PER))}`;
    document.getElementById('btnPP').disabled=perfPage===0;
    document.getElementById('btnNP').disabled=end>=perfsFiltered.length;
    let html='';
    perfsFiltered.slice(start,end).forEach(p=>{
    const loc=fmtLoc(p);
    const isMontado=p.estado_actual==='Montado';
    html+=`<div class="row-item" onclick="showPerf(${p.id})">
    <div class="ri-main">
    <div class="ri-id">📍 ${loc||'—'}</div>
    <div class="ri-meta">${normZona(p.zona)}${p.prof_trabajo_mts?' · '+p.prof_trabajo_mts+'m':''}</div>
    </div>
    ${isMontado?`
    <div style="text-align:right;margin-right:8px">
    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:500;font-family:var(--mono)">${p.modelo||'—'}</div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">${p.marca||''} · ${p.hp?p.hp+'HP':'—'}${p.tag?' · '+p.tag:''}</div>
    </div>
    ${estadoBadge('Montado')}
    `:`<span style="margin-right:8px">${librebadge()}</span>`}
    </div>`;
    });
    document.getElementById('perfs-lista').innerHTML=html||'<div style="text-align:center;padding:2rem;color:var(--text3)">Sin resultados</div>';
    }
    function perfPag(d){perfPage=Math.max(0,Math.min(perfPage+d,Math.ceil(perfsFiltered.length/PER)-1));renderPerfs();}
    function filtrarBombas(){
    const txt=(document.getElementById('fBTexto').value||'').toLowerCase().trim();
    const est=document.getElementById('fBEstado').value;
    const marc=document.getElementById('fBMarca').value;
    const hp=document.getElementById('fBHP').value;
    const ubic=document.getElementById('fBUbic').value;
    bombasFiltered=BOMBAS.filter(b=>{
    if(txt){
    const campos=[b.n_equipo||'',b.tag||'',b.tag_extraviado||'',b.modelo||'',b.marca||'',b.serie||''].map(s=>s.toLowerCase());
    if(!campos.some(x=>x.includes(txt)))return false;
    }
    if(est){
    if(est==='Montado'&&b.estado_actual!=='Montado')return false;
    if(est==='disponible'&&b.estado_actual==='Montado')return false;
    if(est==='Desmontado'&&(b.estado_actual==='Montado'||!b.estado_actual))return false;
    }
    if(ubic&&(b.ubicacion_fisica||'')!==ubic)return false;
    if(marc&&b.marca!==marc)return false;
    if(hp&&String(b.hp)!==hp)return false;
    return true;
    });
    bombaPage=0;renderBombas();
    }
    function renderBombas(){
    const start=bombaPage*PER, end=Math.min(start+PER,bombasFiltered.length);
    document.getElementById('bombaCount').textContent=`${bombasFiltered.length} resultado(s)`;
    document.getElementById('pagInfoB').textContent=`${bombaPage+1}/${Math.max(1,Math.ceil(bombasFiltered.length/PER))}`;
    document.getElementById('btnPB').disabled=bombaPage===0;
    document.getElementById('btnNB').disabled=end>=bombasFiltered.length;
    let html='';
    bombasFiltered.slice(start,end).forEach(b=>{
    const isMontado=b.estado_actual==='Montado';
    const loc=b.calle?fmtLoc(b):'—';
    html+=`<div class="row-item" onclick="showBomba(${b.id})">
    <div class="ri-main">
    <div class="ri-id">${b.n_equipo||'—'} <span style="color:var(--text3);font-weight:400"> · ${b.modelo||'?'} · ${b.marca||'?'}</span></div>
    <div class="ri-meta">TAG: ${b.tag||'—'}${b.serie?' · Serie: '+b.serie:''}</div>
    </div>
    ${isMontado?`<div style="text-align:right;margin-right:8px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text3)">📍 ${loc}</div>`:''}
    <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);font-family:var(--mono);margin-right:6px">${b.hp?b.hp+' HP':'—'}</span>
    ${isMontado?estadoBadge('Montado'):ubicBadge(b.ubicacion_fisica)}
    </div>`;
    });
    document.getElementById('bombas-lista').innerHTML=html||'<div style="text-align:center;padding:2rem;color:var(--text3)">Sin resultados</div>';
    }
    function bombaPag(d){bombaPage=Math.max(0,Math.min(bombaPage+d,Math.ceil(bombasFiltered.length/PER)-1));renderBombas();}
    // ══ DETALLE PERFORACIÓN ══
    async function showPerf(pid){
    currentPerfId=pid;
    const res=await api(`/api/perforaciones/${pid}`);
    if(!res||!res.ok)return;
    const p=await res.json();
    const loc=fmtLoc(p);
    const isMontado=p.historial&&p.historial[0]&&p.historial[0].estado==='Montado';
    const asigActual=isMontado?p.historial[0]:null;
    // Estimación caudal
    let estimHTML='';
    if(asigActual&&asigActual.modelo){
    const cat=findCat(asigActual.modelo);
    if(cat&&p.prof_trabajo_mts){
    const hEst=p.nivel_dinamico?p.prof_trabajo_mts+p.nivel_dinamico:p.prof_trabajo_mts;
    const qEst=interpQ(cat.curva,hEst);
    const hMax=cat.curva[0][1];
    let rc='range-ok',rt='✅ En rango';
    if(hEst>hMax){rc='range-err';rt='❌ Fuera de rango';}
    else if(hEst>hMax*0.88){rc='range-warn';rt='⚠ Cerca del límite';}
    estimHTML=`<div class="estimation-box">
    <div class="est-title">Estimación de caudal${!p.nivel_dinamico?' · <span style="color:var(--amber)">sin nivel dinámico</span>':''}</div>
    <div class="est-grid">
    <div class="est-item"><div class="est-lbl">H estimada</div><div class="est-val">${hEst.toFixed(1)} m</div></div>
    <div class="est-item"><div class="est-lbl">Q estimado</div><div class="est-val ${qEst>0?'range-ok':'range-err'}">${qEst>0?qEst.toFixed(1)+' m³/h':'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="est-item"><div class="est-lbl">Rango</div><div class="est-val ${rc}" style="font-size:11px">${rt}</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>`;
    }
    }
    // Timeline historial
    const tlHTML=p.historial&&p.historial.length?`
    <div style="margin-top:14px">
    <div class="section-divider">Historial de bombas en esta perforación · ${p.historial.length} registros</div>
    <div class="timeline">
    ${p.historial.map((h,i)=>{
    const isAct=i===0&&h.estado==='Montado';
    return`<div class="tl-item">
    <div class="tl-dot ${isAct?'active':'old'}"></div>
    <div class="tl-card ${isAct?'active':''}">
    <div class="tl-title">${h.n_equipo||'—'} · ${h.modelo||'—'} · ${h.marca||''} ${estadoBadge(h.estado)}</div>
    <div class="tl-meta">
    ${h.hp?h.hp+' HP · ':''}TAG: ${h.tag||'—'}
    ${h.fecha_montaje?` · Montada: ${fmtFechaDisplay(h.fecha_montaje)}`:''}
    ${h.fecha_desmontaje?` · Desmontada: ${fmtFechaDisplay(h.fecha_desmontaje)}`:''}
    ${h.notificada_por?` · Por: ${h.notificada_por}`:''}
    </div>
    ${h.notas?`<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--amber);margin-top:3px">⚠ ${h.notas}</div>`:''}
    ${CAN_EDIT?`<div class="tl-actions">
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="editarAsignacion(${h.id},event)">✏ Editar</button>
    ${CAN_ADMIN?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-red" onclick="eliminarAsignacion(${h.id},event)">Eliminar</button>`:''}
    </div>`:''}
    </div>
    </div>`;
    }).join('')}
    </div>
    </div>`:'' ;
    document.getElementById('modal-perf-title').innerHTML=`📍 ${loc||'—'} <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text3)">· ${normZona(p.zona)}</span>`;
    document.getElementById('btn-edit-perf').style.display=CAN_EDIT?'inline-flex':'none';
    document.getElementById('modal-perf-body').innerHTML=`
    <div class="dg">
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Zona</div><div class="di-val">${normZona(p.zona)}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Bombeo</div><div class="di-val">${fmt(p.bombeo)}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Prof. trabajo</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${p.prof_trabajo_mts?p.prof_trabajo_mts+' m':'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Cañería</div><div class="di-val">${fmt(p.tipo_cañeria)}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Nivel estático</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${p.nivel_estatico?p.nivel_estatico+' m':'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Nivel dinámico</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${p.nivel_dinamico?p.nivel_dinamico+' m':'—'}</div></div>
    </div>
    ${isMontado&&asigActual?`
    <div style="background:rgba(52,199,123,.06);border:1px solid rgba(52,199,123,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:10px">
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--green);font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:8px">Bomba montada actualmente</div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px">
    <div style="flex:1">
    <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--mono)">${asigActual.n_equipo||'—'} · ${asigActual.modelo||'—'}</div>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px">${asigActual.marca||''} · ${asigActual.hp||'—'} HP · TAG: ${asigActual.tag||'—'}</div>
    </div>
    ${CAN_EDIT?`
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showBomba(${asigActual.bomba_id||asigActual.id})">Ver bomba</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-red" onclick="desmontarModal(${asigActual.id})">→ Desmontar</button>
    `:''}
    </div>
    </div>
    `:`
    <div style="background:rgba(240,84,84,.05);border:1px dashed rgba(240,84,84,.3);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
    <span style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text3)">Sin bomba montada actualmente</span>
    ${CAN_EDIT?`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="abrirAsignar(${p.id})">+ Asignar bomba</button>`:''}
    </div>
    `}
    ${estimHTML}
    ${tlHTML}
    ${CAN_EDIT&&!isMontado?`<div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="abrirAsignar(${p.id})">+ Asignar nueva bomba</button>
    </div>`:''}
    `;
    openModal('perf');
    }
    // ══ DETALLE BOMBA ══
    async function showBomba(bid){
    currentBombaId=bid;
    const res=await api(`/api/bombas/${bid}`);
    if(!res||!res.ok)return;
    const b=await res.json();
    const isActMontada=b.historial&&b.historial[0]&&b.historial[0].estado==='Montado';
    const tlHTML=b.historial&&b.historial.length?`
    <div style="margin-top:14px">
    <div class="section-divider">Historial de esta bomba · ${b.historial.length} asignaciones</div>
    <div class="timeline">
    ${b.historial.map((h,i)=>{
    const isAct=i===0;
    const locH=[h.calle,h.entre&&h.entre!=='0'?`e/${h.entre}`:null,h.y_col&&h.y_col!=='0'?`y ${h.y_col}`:null].filter(Boolean).join(' ');
    return`<div class="tl-item">
    <div class="tl-dot ${isAct&&h.estado==='Montado'?'active':'old'}"></div>
    <div class="tl-card ${isAct&&h.estado==='Montado'?'active':''}">
    <div class="tl-title">📍 ${locH||'—'} ${estadoBadge(h.estado)}</div>
    <div class="tl-meta">
    ${h.zona?normZona(h.zona)+' · ':''}
    ${h.fecha_montaje?'Montada: '+fmtFechaDisplay(h.fecha_montaje):'Sin fecha montaje'}
    ${h.fecha_desmontaje?' → Desmontada: '+fmtFechaDisplay(h.fecha_desmontaje):''}
    ${h.notificada_por?' · Por: '+h.notificada_por:''}
    </div>
    ${h.notas?`<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--amber);margin-top:3px">⚠ ${h.notas}</div>`:''}
    ${CAN_EDIT?`<div class="tl-actions">
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="editarAsignacion(${h.id},event)">✏ Editar</button>
    ${h.estado==='Montado'?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-red" onclick="desmontarModal(${h.id},event)">→ Desmontar</button>`:''}
    </div>`:''}
    </div>
    </div>`;
    }).join('')}
    </div>
    </div>`:'';
    document.getElementById('modal-bomba-title').innerHTML=`${b.n_equipo||'—'} <span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text3)">· ${b.modelo||'—'} · ${b.marca||'—'}</span>`;
    document.getElementById('btn-edit-bomba').style.display=CAN_EDIT?'inline-flex':'none';
    document.getElementById('modal-bomba-body').innerHTML=`
    <div class="dg">
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">TAG actual</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${b.tag||'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">TAG anterior/extraviado</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${b.tag_extraviado||'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Marca</div><div class="di-val">${b.marca||'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Modelo</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${b.modelo||'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Potencia</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${b.hp?b.hp+' HP':'—'}${b.kw?' / '+b.kw+' kW':''}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">Amperes</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${b.amperes||'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">N° Serie</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${b.serie||'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di"><div class="di-label">SAP ID</div><div class="di-val" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${b.sap_id||'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="di" style="grid-column:span 2"><div class="di-label">Ubicación física</div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:4px">
    ${ubicBadge(b.ubicacion_fisica)}
    ${CAN_EDIT&&!isActMontada?`<select onchange="cambiarUbicacion(${b.id},this.value)" style="max-width:180px;font-size:12px">
    <option value="">— cambiar —</option>
    ${['Pañol','Sucursal','Grúa','PSM Cañero','En reparación','Baja'].map(u=>`<option ${b.ubicacion_fisica===u?'selected':''}>${u}</option>`).join('')}
    </select>`:''}
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    ${isActMontada?`
    <div style="background:rgba(52,199,123,.06);border:1px solid rgba(52,199,123,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:10px">
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--green);font-family:var(--mono);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:6px">Montada actualmente en</div>
    <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--mono)">📍 ${[b.historial[0].calle,b.historial[0].y_col&&b.historial[0].y_col!=='0'?'y '+b.historial[0].y_col:null].filter(Boolean).join(' ')}</div>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px">${normZona(b.historial[0].zona)}</div>
    </div>
    `:`<div style="background:rgba(79,142,247,.05);border:1px solid rgba(79,142,247,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:10px;font-size:13px">
    🔵 Disponible para ser asignada
    </div>`}
    ${b.observaciones?`<div class="obs-box">⚠ ${b.observaciones}</div>`:''}
    ${tlHTML}
    ${CAN_EDIT?`<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">
    ${!isActMontada?`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="abrirAsignarBomba(${b.id})">+ Asignar a perforación</button>`:''}
    ${CAN_ADMIN?`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-red" onclick="eliminarBomba(${b.id})">Eliminar bomba</button>`:''}
    </div>`:''}
    `;
    openModal('bomba');
    }
    // ══ ASIGNAR BOMBA ══
    async function abrirAsignar(perfId){
    // Load available bombas
    const res=await api('/api/bombas/disponibles');
    if(!res||!res.ok)return;
    const disponibles=await res.json();
    const perf=PERFS.find(p=>p.id===perfId);
    document.getElementById('modal-asignar-title').textContent=`Asignar bomba a ${fmtLoc(perf)||'perforación'}`;
    document.getElementById('modal-asignar-body').innerHTML=`
    <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:12px">${disponibles.length} bombas disponibles en el inventario</p>
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <label>Buscar bomba disponible</label>
    <input type="text" id="asig-search" placeholder="N° equipo, TAG, modelo..." oninput="filtrarAsigDisp()">
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="padding:.5rem 1rem;max-height:240px;overflow-y:auto" id="asig-lista"></div>
    <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:12px;margin-top:12px">
    <div class="section-divider">Datos de la asignación</div>
    <div class="g3" style="margin-top:8px">
    <div><label>Fecha montaje</label><input type="text" id="asig-fecha" placeholder="dd/mm/yyyy"></div>
    <div><label>Notificada por</label><input type="text" id="asig-noti"></div>
    <div><label>Notas</label><input type="text" id="asig-notas"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="closeModal('asignar')">Cancelar</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="confirmarAsignar(${perfId})">Confirmar asignación</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    `;
    // Store disponibles for filtering
    window._asigDisp = disponibles;
    window._asigSelected = null;
    renderAsigDisp(disponibles);
    openModal('asignar');
    }
    function renderAsigDisp(lista){
    document.getElementById('asig-lista').innerHTML=lista.map(b=>`
    <div class="row-item" onclick="selAsig(${b.id},this)" id="asig-item-${b.id}">
    <div class="ri-main">
    <div class="ri-id">${b.n_equipo||'—'} · ${b.modelo||'?'}</div>
    <div class="ri-meta">${b.marca||'?'} · ${b.hp?b.hp+'HP':''} · TAG: ${b.tag||'—'}</div>
    </div>
    </div>`).join('')||'<div style="padding:1rem;color:var(--text3);text-align:center">Sin resultados</div>';
    }
    function filtrarAsigDisp(){
    const txt=(document.getElementById('asig-search').value||'').toLowerCase();
    renderAsigDisp(window._asigDisp.filter(b=>
    [b.n_equipo,b.tag,b.modelo,b.marca,b.serie].some(v=>v&&v.toLowerCase().includes(txt))
    ));
    }
    function selAsig(id,el){
    document.querySelectorAll('[id^="asig-item-"]').forEach(e=>e.style.background='');
    el.style.background='rgba(79,142,247,.1)';
    window._asigSelected=id;
    }
    async function confirmarAsignar(perfId){
    if(!window._asigSelected){toast('Seleccioná una bomba','err');return;}
    const data={
    bomba_id:window._asigSelected,
    perforacion_id:perfId,
    estado:'Montado',
    fecha_montaje:normFecha(document.getElementById('asig-fecha').value)||null,
    notificada_por:document.getElementById('asig-noti').value||null,
    notas:document.getElementById('asig-notas').value||null,
    };
    const res=await api('/api/asignaciones','POST',data);
    if(!res||!res.ok){const e=await res.json();toast(e.error||'Error','err');return;}
    closeModal('asignar');
    closeModal('perf');
    toast('Bomba asignada correctamente');
    await loadAll();
    showPerf(perfId);
    }
    async function abrirAsignarBomba(bombaId){
    // Assign a specific bomba to a perforacion
    const perf_opts=PERFS.filter(p=>p.estado_actual!=='Montado');
    document.getElementById('modal-asignar-title').textContent='Asignar a perforación';
    document.getElementById('modal-asignar-body').innerHTML=`
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <label>Buscar perforación libre</label>
    <input type="text" id="asig-perf-search" placeholder="Calle, zona..." oninput="filtrarAsigPerf()">
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="padding:.5rem 1rem;max-height:240px;overflow-y:auto" id="asig-perf-lista"></div>
    <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:12px;margin-top:12px">
    <div class="g3">
    <div><label>Fecha montaje</label><input type="text" id="asig2-fecha" placeholder="dd/mm/yyyy"></div>
    <div><label>Notificada por</label><input type="text" id="asig2-noti"></div>
    <div><label>Notas</label><input type="text" id="asig2-notas"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onclick="closeModal('asignar')">Cancelar</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="confirmarAsignarBomba(${bombaId})">Confirmar</button>
    </div>
    </div>`;
    window._asigPerfDisp=perf_opts;
    window._asigPerfSelected=null;
    renderAsigPerf(perf_opts);
    openModal('asignar');
    }
    function renderAsigPerf(lista){
    document.getElementById('asig-perf-lista').innerHTML=lista.map(p=>`
    <div class="row-item" onclick="selAsigPerf(${p.id},this)" id="asig-perf-${p.id}">
    <div class="ri-main">
    <div class="ri-id">📍 ${fmtLoc(p)}</div>
    <div class="ri-meta">${normZona(p.zona)}${p.prof_trabajo_mts?' · '+p.prof_trabajo_mts+'m':''}</div>
    </div>
    </div>`).join('')||'<div style="padding:1rem;color:var(--text3);text-align:center">Sin perforaciones libres</div>';
    }
    function filtrarAsigPerf(){
    const txt=(document.getElementById('asig-perf-search').value||'').toLowerCase();
    renderAsigPerf(window._asigPerfDisp.filter(p=>
    [p.calle,p.y_col,p.zona,p.entre].some(v=>v&&v.toLowerCase().includes(txt))
    ));
    }
    function selAsigPerf(id,el){
    document.querySelectorAll('[id^="asig-perf-"]').forEach(e=>e.style.background='');
    el.style.background='rgba(79,142,247,.1)';
    window._asigPerfSelected=id;
    }
    async function confirmarAsignarBomba(bombaId){
    if(!window._asigPerfSelected){toast('Seleccioná una perforación','err');return;}
    const data={
    bomba_id:bombaId,
    perforacion_id:window._asigPerfSelected,
    View remainder of file in raw view
